ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "avg_annual_demand" REAL /* Average annual energy demand for the region in MW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "avg_annual_demand" REAL /* Average annual energy demand for the state in MW */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecasted_demand" REAL /* Forecasted demand in MW */,
  "actual_demand" REAL /* Actual demand in MW */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Error margin of the forecasted demand */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast as a percentage */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the compliance record */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable source record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the source is located */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy source (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "capacity_mw" REAL /* Capacity of the energy source in MW */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy source was installed */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance is due for the source */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewable_sources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emergency protocol */,
  "last_exercise_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was last exercised */,
  "next_exercise_date" TEXT /* Date of the next exercise */,
  "exercise_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the last exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_protocols_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "key_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics included in the report */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Detailed analysis based on the report metrics */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "prepared_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who prepared the report */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
